statement: Kanban movement & off-stage dropzones — Users dragging items in Kanban must never lose drag context when the target is outside the visible area. — Kanban movement: phases horizontal; actions vertical within a phase and horizontal between phases; tasks within and between actions. When dragging near/beyond visible bounds, support edge-scroll, valid insertion zones, off-stage dropzones, and continuation feedback (e.g. moving a phase beyond bounds shows a valid insertion area or scrolls; moving an action to a far phase triggers horizontal movement/target highlight; moving a task to an action highlights the destination).
